description: GitHub Actions deprecated Node.js 20 on 2025-09-19. actions/checkout@v4 emits a deprecation warning and will be forced to Node 24 on 2026-06-02, removed on 2026-09-16. Upgrade .github/workflows/ci.yml and .github/workflows/release-plz.yml from actions/checkout@v4 to @v5. Check if Swatinem/rust-cache and taiki-e/install-action also need upgrades at the same time.
title: Upgrade actions/checkout to v5 (Node 24)
